name: Square Customer
description: Represents a Square customer profile in the Customer Directory of a Square seller. Customers can be associated with payments, orders, loyalty programs, gift cards, and bookings.

id.description: A unique Square-assigned ID for the customer profile.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the customer profile was created, in RFC 3339 format.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the customer profile was last updated, in RFC 3339 format.

given_name.description: The given name (that is, the first name) associated with the customer profile.

family_name.description: The family name (that is, the last name) associated with the customer profile.

nickname.description: A nickname for the customer profile.

company_name.description: A business name associated with the customer profile.

email_address.description: The email address associated with the customer profile.

address.description: The physical address associated with the customer profile.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address, if any.

address_line_3.description: The third line of the address, if any.

locality.description: The city or town of the address.

sublocality.description: A civil region within the address's locality, if any.

administrative_district_level_1.description: A civil entity within the address's country. In the US, this is the state.

country.description: The address's country, in the two-letter format of ISO 3166.

phone_number.description: The phone number associated with the customer profile.

birthday.description: The birthday associated with the customer profile, in YYYY-MM-DD format. For example, 1998-09-21 represents September 21, 1998, and 0000-09-21 represents September 21 (without a birth year).

reference_id.description: An optional second ID used to associate the customer profile with an entity in another system.

note.description: A custom note associated with the customer profile.

email_unsubscribed.description: Whether the customer has unsubscribed from marketing campaign emails.

creation_source.description: The method used to create the customer profile.

group_ids.description: The IDs of customer groups the customer belongs to.

segment_ids.description: The IDs of customer segments the customer belongs to.

version.description: The Square-assigned version number of the customer profile. The version number is incremented each time an update is committed to the customer profile.

tax_ids.description: The tax IDs associated with the customer profile. This field is available for customers of sellers in EU countries or the United Kingdom.

eu_vat.description: The EU VAT identification number for the customer.
